common.tagline: Run your business with clarity and capability.

seo.title: Tiram — Billing & inventory software for businesses worldwide
seo.description: Tax-compliant invoicing, multi-warehouse inventory, payments, and reports — built for businesses of any size, anywhere. GST, VAT, and sales-tax ready, with English/Tamil UI and offline desktop apps for Windows and Mac.
seo.ogDescription: Invoice in any tax regime, track stock across warehouses, run your books in English or Tamil. 30-day free trial.
seo.keywords: billing software, invoicing software, inventory software, inventory management software, multi-warehouse inventory, tax-compliant invoicing, cloud billing software, offline billing software, GST invoicing, VAT invoicing, sales tax invoicing, HSN/SAC invoicing, UPI billing, thermal printer billing, multilingual billing, Tamil billing app, stock transfer software, defaulter tracking software, Tally alternative, Vyapar alternative, KhataBook alternative, Odoo alternative, billing software India, inventory software India, GST billing software India
seo.orgDescription: Tiram is global billing and inventory software. Tax-compliant invoicing (GST, VAT, sales tax), multi-warehouse stock, payment recording, and bilingual (Tamil + English) UI, available as cloud and offline desktop apps for Windows and Mac.

hero.eyebrow: Billing and inventory, global by default.
hero.h1: Billing and inventory software for any business, any size.
hero.subhead: Tiram helps businesses of every size — from single-counter shops to distributors and multi-branch chains — create tax-compliant invoices, track stock across warehouses, record payments, and run their books in the language they choose. Available as a cloud web app and offline desktop apps for Windows and Mac. A mobile app is under development.
hero.microTrust: 30-day free trial · No card needed · Cloud + offline desktop for Windows and Mac

trust.intro: Everything any business needs — out of the box.

howItWorks.heading: Run your business in 4 steps.
howItWorks.intro: From product setup to invoice, payment, and daily report — the workflow stays connected.

steps.title: Add stock
steps.body: Products with tax codes, reorder levels, and warehouse-wise stock counts.

steps.title: Bill in seconds
steps.body: Pick customer, add items, print thermal or share the link.

steps.title: Track dues
steps.body: Record payments, age receivables, spot defaulters before they hurt.

steps.title: Decide daily
steps.body: Dashboard ranks what to act on — tax filing due, dues, slow stock.

region.heading: Built for your region, not adapted to it
region.intro: Tax rules, payment methods, languages, and printing conventions vary by country. Tiram lets you configure all of them — and ships with deep, working defaults for India today, with more regions rolling out.

items.title: India: GST, UPI, Tamil
items.body: GSTIN validation, HSN/SAC line items, CGST/SGST/IGST by place of supply, UPI payment recording, and Tamil-friendly receipts.

items.title: EU + GCC: VAT-ready
items.body: VAT number capture, item-level VAT rates, reverse-charge handling on the roadmap, and EUR / AED display.

items.title: US: sales tax
items.body: Per-jurisdiction sales tax setup, tax-exempt customer flags, and USD display.

items.title: Anywhere else: configurable tax engine
items.body: Define your own tax types, rates, and rules — and run period reports your accountant uses.

items.title: Multi-currency display
items.body: Pricing today in INR; other currencies on request; multi-currency invoicing on the roadmap.

items.title: Multilingual UI + receipts
items.body: English and Tamil today, more locales rolling out; non-Latin script rendering proven on Tamil receipts.

whyTiram.heading: Why businesses choose Tiram
whyTiram.intro: Tiram exists to make your business healthier — not just to print invoices. Five ways that shows up every day.

items.title: One tool, end-to-end
items.body: Billing, inventory, dues, reports, and staff in one place — not a ledger app plus a billing app plus a spreadsheet. Fewer reconciliation gaps, one source of truth, one bill at the end of the month.

items.title: Grows with your business
items.body: Multi-organization, multi-branch, multi-warehouse, and role-based staff are built in from day one. Open a second counter, add a distributor branch, hire a cashier — no painful migration to a bigger tool later.

items.title: Live in minutes, not months
items.body: Opinionated for billing and inventory, with sensible defaults for GST, UPI, and thermal receipts. No consultant rollout, no implementation phase. You are billing before lunch.

items.title: Decisions, not just data entry
items.body: Aging dues, low-stock alerts, slow-moving items, branch-wise profit, and GST exposure — surfaced where you can act on them. Owners catch problems weeks earlier instead of finding out at year-end.

items.title: Cash health, not just invoices
items.body: Receivables tracking, payment allocation, defaulter views, and UPI-based follow-ups are baked in. Faster collections, less working capital locked up in unpaid invoices — the part of business improvement most billing tools ignore.

faq.heading: Questions, answered
faq.intro: Short answers. If you want a longer one, write to us.

items.a: Yes. Tiram has a 30-day free trial with no credit card required. The Standard plan is priced per user, with monthly and annual billing options.

items.q: Does Tiram support GST, VAT, sales tax, and other tax systems?
items.a: Yes. Tiram has a configurable tax engine — define your own tax types, rates, and rules. India's GST is the deepest example today (GSTIN validation, HSN/SAC, automatic CGST/SGST/IGST by place of supply, period reports your accountant uses). VAT and sales tax are supported, with more depth rolling out.
English and Tamil today, with more locales rolling out. The thermal receipt path includes Tamil-friendly raster rendering where the printer setup supports it. Per-user locale switching is built in.

items.q: What payment methods does Tiram support?
items.a: Cash, card, UPI, bank transfer, credit, and other modes. UPI is the deepest example for India — save the business UPI ID and mark invoice payments by UPI. Other regional payment modes can be configured.

items.q: Can I print to a thermal printer?
items.a: Yes. Tiram supports browser printing for invoices and ESC/POS thermal printer setup for counter receipts, including Tamil-friendly raster printing where supported.
Yes. Every business is fully isolated — no shared rows. Authentication is industry-standard, data is encrypted in transit, and only people you invite can see your books.

items.q: Can multiple staff members use it?
items.a: Yes. Invite staff to your business with role-based access — counter, accountant, or admin — and an audit trail tracks who did what.

items.q: Can I switch from another tool?
items.a: Yes. You can bulk-import products and customers from a spreadsheet exported from any other tool — Tally, Vyapar, KhataBook, QuickBooks, Zoho Books, or anything else. Reach out if you need help with the migration.

items.q: Does Tiram have an offline desktop app?
items.a: Yes. Tiram has an offline desktop app available for Windows and Mac, useful for counters where internet access is unreliable. Contact the Tiram team for desktop activation.

items.q: Is there a Tiram mobile app?
items.a: The Tiram mobile app is under development. Today, businesses can use the cloud web app or the offline desktop app for Windows and Mac.

items.q: Which countries does Tiram work in?
items.a: Anywhere. Billing, inventory, and dues are universal. Tax compliance is configurable — India's GST is the deepest example today, with VAT (EU/GCC), sales tax (US), and other regimes supported and growing in depth.

items.q: Can I bill in multiple currencies?
items.a: Pricing today is in INR; other display currencies are available on request. Multi-currency invoicing is on the roadmap — talk to us if it's a need for your business.

finalCta.heading: Less ledger. More leverage.
finalCta.subhead: Stop juggling spreadsheets and start running the business.
